poster_title: DataGovBench: Benchmarking LLM Agents for Real-World Data Governance Workflows
authors: Zhou Liu1* Zhaoyang Han1* Guochen Yan1 Hao Liang1 Bohan Zeng1 Xing Chen2 Yuanfeng Song2 Wentao Zhang1

content: Data governance is crucial for modern AI development.
Practitioners spend significant time on data cleaning and validation.
Existing benchmarks do not capture data governance challenges.
Current LLMs and frameworks struggle with complex workflows.
Lack of robust error-correction mechanisms in data governance tasks.
150 real-world data governance tasks covering six scenarios.
Novel 'reversed-objective' methodology for realistic noise synthesis.
Auto-generated, task-specific evaluation scripts for pipeline reliability.
Evaluated on 150 tasks from real-world data sources.
Compared DataGovAgent with general-purpose baselines and SOTA LLMs.
DataGovAgent increases Average Task Score (ATS) from 39.7 to 54.9.
Proposed framework enhances reliability and efficiency in data governance.
DataGovBench and DataGovAgent address critical gaps in data governance.
Demonstrate the potential of LLMs in this domain.
